component.name: ChaBox
component.summary: Open-source, free, no-sign-up, zero-preset offline file security workstation with high-performance encryption/decryption, archiving, and secure wipe.

description.p: ChaBox is an open-source, free, no-sign-up, zero-preset offline file security tool for personal and professional use. It supports local encryption, decryption, archiving, unarchiving, and secure wipe. It is ad-free, does not collect data in the background, does not rely on cloud services, and your local files and passwords always stay under your control.
Quick Start (3 core features you can use right away)

ul.li: Secure Note: write like a Markdown notebook with immersive editing and live preview, while notes are automatically encrypted at rest.
One-click smart encrypt/decrypt: drag and drop files, and ChaBox auto-detects the workflow for fast protection and recovery.
Secure wipe (overwrite deletion): securely overwrite sensitive data to reduce plaintext residue risk.

description.p: Advanced Usage (freely combine tools your way)

ul.li: De-preset design: no built-in use-case constraints and no fixed workflow boundaries.
Atomic toolchain: Archive, Unarchive, Encrypt, Decrypt, and Wipe can be used independently or composed into custom flows.
Batch and directory governance: native directory organization plus parameterized batch processing for migration, backup, and auditing.

Core engine: ChaCha20-Poly1305 authenticated encryption with streaming processing, combining high performance with strict integrity verification. Tampered ciphertext is rejected immediately during decryption.
Cross-end workflow: the companion CLI, chapose, uses the same encryption format and core mechanism, suitable for server deployment, scheduled periodic jobs, and scripted pipelines.

description.p: Starting now, download and use ChaBox to truly take control of your privacy data.

screenshot.caption: Encrypt files, use Secure Notes, and run Secure Erase from one home screen for a streamlined privacy workflow.
Drag in files for automatic detection and one-step encryption to protect sensitive data quickly.
File Vault offers visual listing and categorization for centralized viewing and management of encrypted files.
Filter by path, type, size, and time to locate target files accurately, even in large datasets.
Keep private notes encrypted in one place with a clear, efficient list-based management view.
Write and preview Markdown in real time within a secure environment for a better private note-taking experience.
Use deep overwrite-based Secure Erase to remove sensitive files and reduce recovery risk.
Manage passwords, lock settings, and anti-leak protections in one settings center for safer daily use.
The Archive tool provides a standardized workflow for more efficient and controllable batch processing.
Import and edit source paths in batch to reduce preparation time before execution.
